content:
# Rba

**Summary**: A visual experiment used to determine interfacial tension and MMP by observing the behavior of gas bubbles in oil.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2023-al-hakami|Al-Hakami, 2023]] used RBA as a swift replacement for slim tube to measure interfacial tension between two immiscible fluids.

## Instruments and Software



## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- The maximum rising bubble height is plotted against the pressure; the intersection of extrapolated lines identifies the MMP. ([[2023-al-hakami|Al-Hakami, 2023, p. 62]])
